title: Littleproud Resigns, Iranian Footballers Escape 'Prison' Hotel, Skin Cancer Trend Warning | 10 News+
description: It’s a bittersweet moment as five Iranian women’s football players managed to escape their hotel to seek refuge in Australia, leaving behind their fellow teammates and lives amid threats at home.  It is believed the remaining players are being controlled and coerced as protesters tried to stop their bus by jumping in front of it as a last minute plea to keep them in Australia.  Today, Prime Minister Anthony Albanese announced that Australia will send military support to Gulf states affected by Iranian missile and drone strikes.  National Affairs Editor Hugh Riminton explains exactly which weapons the Australian Defence Force will deploy and how much they are worth.  A dodgy treatment known as Black Slave is trending on social media and has sparked concern after doctors warn it can actually destroy healthy skin, leaving holes, scarring and infections.  Despite being labelled a 'city girl', Michelle Pfeiffer reveals she's got what it takes to rough it in the country alongside her co-star Kurt Russell, after revealing a hilarious toilet secret during her interview for The Madison.  10 News+ LIVE: Trusted, in-depth reporting from Australia and around the world. 👍 Like this stream to support our in-depth coverage 🔔 Subscribe and turn on notifications for breaking news alerts ↗ Share this coverage to keep others informed  📲 Stay Across Breaking News 24/7 Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/10NewsPlus/ TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@10newsplus/ Snapchat: https://www.snapchat.com/add/tennewsplus 🎧 Listen on Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/show/0tWZ6sIJTQ2WHgYdjgaAA7?si=cb30d7fd3d3541fa  📺 Watch 10 News+ 6pm Monday–Friday | 6:30pm Sunday on Network 10 Missed the bulletin? title: Pup Survives 9 Days Without Food At 1,900m | 10 News
